title: Totem 3D - Heycronus
description: 3D Totem of Undying is a texture pack for Minecraft that enhances the appearance of the Totem of Undying by giving it a 3D model
body:
![Totem 3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8efa25e299af3460751ff40a26d3fab99b7a9897_0.webp)

3D Totem of Undying is a texture pack for Minecraft that enhances the appearance of the Totem of Undying by giving it a 3D model. This pack updates not only the item in your inventory but also its representation in the GUI and animation, providing a more immersive experience.

3D Totem of Undying transforms the standard 2D Totem of Undying in Minecraft into a detailed 3D model. This texture pack includes:
- 3D Totem in Inventory: The Totem of Undying now appears as a 3D item when viewed in your inventory, offering a more realistic look.
- Enhanced GUI Representation: The 3D model is also visible in the game's GUI, ensuring consistency across your gameplay.
- Updated Animations: When the Totem of Undying is activated, the animation showcases the new 3D model, adding depth and realism to the experience.

Whether you're exploring dangerous caves or facing off against powerful mobs, the **3D Totem of Undying** texture pack enhances your visual experience, making the iconic item even more impressive. Download now and give your Minecraft adventures a fresh, immersive upgrade!
